app.name: Reddit2Go!
app.description: Reddit2Go! is your go-to reddit app for Windows 8! It's designed to fully take advantage of Windows 8 features to make your redditing experience the best it can be. Browse the front page or any subreddit, log in with your reddit account, vote, comment, submit links, search, and more! Check out the App Features section below for a larger list of what this app can do, and be sure to check out all the screenshots. Optionally, you can go Pro! to show your support for the app. There are no additional features unlocked right now, but I have some ideas for future releases that may be added. The free version, though, is a fully capable client, and there are no advertisements. This app is only the beginning; I have lots of ideas for future updates. I'm also open to feedback - either email me at reddit-to-go@outlook.com, or make a post in www.reddit.com/r/reddit_to_go. Happy redditing!
